supersedes_workspace_file: monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-211.json (collided with WIN-038 eigenvalue content 2026-04-22; redraft preserves original EXP-211 Phase A intent)
summary: Redraft of EXP-211 ready per operator HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-EXP-211-REDRAFT-001. Phase A design refresh Item 4 (accuracy-math sidebar demotion / EXP-A6). Consolidates the two Overview accuracy-math callouts (hero 4+4 Actual Failures sc-sublabel arithmetic clause + bordered accent box about the headline being hardcoded) into a single sub-hero <aside class="accuracy-math-aside"> placed after the sc-breakdown block and before the Downloads heading. Preserves all arithmetic (honest-accuracy percentage, denominator formula, accuracy variant list), all source-code critique clauses verbatim, and all internal anchors (#p3-failures, #part6); adds one new cross-reference to #timestamp-error. Only one editorial synthesis sentence (self-serving-denominator) is dropped; factual substrate preserved. Four coordinated edits to build-scripts/generate-html.js, zero changes to data/sections.json. Carries DRAFT_AWAITING_HUMAN_GROUP_REVIEW + FOUNDATIONAL_MODEL_CHANGE per HNOTE routing rules. Integration blocked_until operator-posted HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A2-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN lands with approved_exp_ids containing EXP-211; also blocked_until EXP-202 (Phase A1 tokens) has integrated. Route to curmudgeon for adversarial review.

integration_hold.blocked_until: operator posts HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A2-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN with approved_exp_ids containing EXP-211 AND Phase A1 (EXP-202 tokens) has integrated
integration_hold.reason: HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-001 hard-hold: every Phase A EXP carries DRAFT_AWAITING_HUMAN_GROUP_REVIEW until a named approval HNOTE lands referencing the specific EXP ID. Per HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-EXP-211-REDRAFT-001, A2 integration uses a distinct HNOTE from the A1 batch.

close_on_fix.resolution: EXP-211 redrafted as monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-211-redesign.json per HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-EXP-211-REDRAFT-001. Phase A2 ready for operator approval HNOTE. Collision root-cause noted in the redraft file (non-atomic EXP-ID allocation across concurrent workspace+clone writers); operational fix is out-of-scope for this EXP.
close_on_fix.decider_action: Set ISS-1351 status=fixed with fix_date=today, fix_details referencing EXP-211-redesign.json. Leave the collided monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-211.json (WIN-038 eigenvalue content) in place — it is valid content under its own item_id wrapper; optional rename to EXP-211-WIN038-coupled-eigenvalue.json for clarity (already has that filename as a sibling).

curmudgeon_request_notes: Phase A2 design EXP — adversarial review before operator-group approval. Probes: (a) does the aside pitch actually demote below hero scorecard? Measure font-size, border weight, and vertical area ratios. (b) CC2 preserved? Screenshot-test one-scroll reachability at 1080p; measure distance from hero card to aside arithmetic line. (c) content-preservation — diff the aside prose against the removed bordered-box prose and the stripped sublabel clause; confirm verbatim preservation of all source-code-critique clauses. (d) NC5 computed-counts rule — grep aside HTML for any hardcoded numbers or percentages outside template substitutions. (e) WCAG AA contrast for .92rem var(--ink-2) over #1a1a2e dark-theme page bg. (f) defensive rendering for empty accuracyVariantList — confirm the ternary wrap in change_3 is implemented and renders grammatically. (g) semantic element: <aside> vs. <section aria-labelledby> — weigh strict WAI-ARIA reading vs. visual-role match. (h) kicker phrasing: editorializes? group preference? (i) dropped self-serving-denominator sentence — does the factual substrate carry the claim adequately? (j) breakpoint at 720px — does tablet portrait (768–1024) render readably? (k) aside position vs. Latest Findings — confirm aside sits after sc-breakdown and before Downloads, NOT between hero and breaking-news. (l) assertions testability — do the three new test.js assertions correctly detect the intended invariants. Apply DIRECTIVE-20260422-003 curmudgeon truth-vs-standards rubric if landed by review time; otherwise note pending status.
phase_a_batch_context: Phase A1 batch (EXP-202/207/208/209/210/212/213) is covered by HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-001 (in-flight). This EXP (EXP-211-redesign) is Phase A2 — a standalone straggler with its own named approval HNOTE (HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A2-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN, not yet posted). It is INDEPENDENT of A1 for content but DEPENDS on A1 for the EXP-202 tokens (--ink-2, --ink-3, --rule, --sans, --mono) it consumes. Recommend A2 approval HNOTE wait until A1 has integrated.
